fields.name: Team Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the team to which the salesperson belongs.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson you want to register as part of the team.

fields.name: Team Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the team.

fields.name: Salesperson Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the salesperson you want to register as part of the team.
